yearly.analysisText: Analysis of the SPY seasonal pattern above shows that a Buy Date of Mar 24 and a Sell Date of Dec 16 has resulted in a geometric average return of +14.6% over the past 10 years. This seasonal timeframe has shown positive results in 9 of those 10 periods (90%), rated Excellent. The current presidential cycle is Year 2 (midterm year), which historically averages -13.5%.
